title: Upgrade AgentLoop for autonomous capabilities (observe + adjust hooks)
context_files: src/lib/interpreter/agentLoop.ts (existing AgentLoop from subtask 03; add observe/adjust hooks)
acceptance_criteria: AgentLoop.execute accepts optional observeStep callback: (step, result) => Promise<AgentObservation>
AgentLoop.execute accepts optional adjustPlan callback: (observation) => Promise<AgentPlan>
When callbacks provided and observation.needsAdjustment: calls adjustPlan and continues with adjusted plan
When callbacks NOT provided: AgentLoop behaves exactly as in Phase B (backward compatible)
Existing AgentLoop tests from Phase B still pass unchanged
Upgraded loop tracks additional state: observations array, adjustment history
